yesterdayAnalysis: Pool swim session yesterday delivered 23 TSS with controlled HR averaging 107 bpm across 1.7 miles. This was the second swim in the week's planned 9000m target volume, maintaining the aerobic base without excessive stress. Recovery-focused execution appropriate for the day before the peak week's long bike ride.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's long bike ride with disciplined pacing in Zone 2, targeting 150-180 TSS to anchor this peak volume week. Focus on race-simulation nutrition and maintaining power at 145-152w NP to practice the conservative bike strategy that earned you the 16-min run PR at Oceanside.
weekProgress: Week 8 of 10 tracking well at 312 TSS with the critical Saturday long ride still ahead — exactly as designed for this back-loaded schedule. Tuesday's 10.2-mile long run (102 TSS) and Wednesday's brick completed key sessions; today's long bike will be the week's anchor workout toward the 500 TSS target with Sunday's run/OWS still to come.
keyInsight: Peak week execution is on schedule with all major sessions completed or queued; last night's excellent 82-score sleep (8.1h, 93min REM) positions you perfectly for today's longest bike effort of the build.
